Module it.polimi.ingsw.am12
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Client.UI.CLI

Class CLIDrawBufferHand

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Client.UI.CLI.CLIDrawBufferHand
All Implemented Interfaces:
CLIDrawBuffer
public class CLIDrawBufferHand extends Object implements CLIDrawBuffer
Buffer for the CLI that draws and prints the cards in the hand of the player

  • Constructor Details

    • CLIDrawBufferHand

      public CLIDrawBufferHand(List<CliCard> repCards)
      Class constructor
      Parameters:
      repCards - the list of all the cards in form of CliCards given by the CLI

  • Method Details

    • insertCardsInBuffer

      public void insertCardsInBuffer(List<Integer> indexes)
      It inserts the new hand in the buffer
      Parameters:
      indexes - a list of 3 integers that represents each a card of the new hand, if the index is a -1, it leaves a hole in the hand

    • extractCardfromIndex

      public List<String> extractCardfromIndex(int index, boolean side)
      Method to transform the integer value, the index, that travels in the network in the graphical and printable way, a list of strings
      Specified by:
      extractCardfromIndex in interface CLIDrawBuffer
      Parameters:
      index - the integer value corresponding to a exact card
      side - a boolean that represents the side of the card wanted by the player
      Returns:
      a list of strings, the representation of the card

    • printBuffer

      public void printBuffer()
      Method used to print the buffer in the CLI
      Specified by:
      printBuffer in interface CLIDrawBuffer

    • flipCard

      public void flipCard(int index)
      Method used to flip a card of the hand on the other side
      Parameters:
      index - the position in the hand of the card to flip
